key.name: show-indicator
key.description: Safety toggle. Turn off to always show panel.

key.name: panel-position
key.description: Position of the panel as a percentage of screen height (0 = top, 100 = bottom).

key.name: hide-debounce-ms
key.description: The delay in milliseconds before the panel hides after the cursor leaves. Prevents the panel from flickering or hiding during accidental mouse movements.

key.name: hide-margin-px
key.description: The distance in pixels the cursor must move away from the panel before the hide timer starts. A larger margin prevents the panel from hiding if the cursor slightly overshoots the edge.

key.name: check-debounce-ms
key.description: The frequency in milliseconds at which the extension checks for cursor position or pressure events. Lower values are more responsive but use more CPU.
